description: This Dart source file defines the NotesRepository class, which manages local notes storage using SharedPreferences. It provides methods to list, add, update, delete, search, and toggle pinned status of notes. It also handles persistence of configuration data like API base URL and includes helper functions for encoding and decoding note data.

classes.name: NotesRepository
classes.description: A repository class managing notes stored locally with SharedPreferences, supporting CRUD operations, search, and configuration.

methods.name: listNotes
methods.description: Retrieves all notes from local storage.

methods.name: upsertNote
methods.description: Inserts or updates a note in local storage.

methods.name: deleteNote
methods.description: Deletes a note by ID from local storage.

methods.name: searchNotes
methods.description: Searches notes by query matching title, content, or tags.

methods.name: togglePinned
methods.description: Toggles the pinned status of a note by ID.

methods.name: setApiBaseUrl
methods.description: Stores the API base URL in local storage.

methods.name: getApiBaseUrl
methods.description: Retrieves the API base URL from local storage, defaults if not set.

methods.name: _decodeMap
methods.description: Decodes a string into a map by parsing key-value pairs.

methods.name: _encodeMap
methods.description: Encodes a map into a string for storage.
